QuickWallTypeChange.Name: Ctrl-click wall type buttons to update selected walls
QuickWallTypeChange.Hint: When enabled, Ctrl-clicking Normal, Terrain, Invisible, Ethereal, Window, Door, or Secret Door in the Wall Controls changes the selected walls to that type.

HoveredWallHotkeyTypeChange.Name: Wall type hotkeys update hovered Foundry walls
HoveredWallHotkeyTypeChange.Hint: When enabled, wall type hotkeys can change the Foundry wall under the mouse while Wall Controls are active. Indy shape segment hotkeys still work while editing shapes.

DebugShapeSelection.Name: Debug Indy shape selection
DebugShapeSelection.Hint: When enabled, Ctrl-click shape selection diagnostics are written to the browser console.

ActiveShapeToolHighlightColor.Name: Active Indy shape tool highlight color
ActiveShapeToolHighlightColor.Hint: Hex color used to highlight the selected Indy shape drawing tool in the Wall Controls.

ActiveShapeToolHighlightGlow.Name: Active Indy shape tool glow
ActiveShapeToolHighlightGlow.Hint: Glow strength for the selected Indy shape drawing tool button. Set to 0 to disable the glow.

ActiveShapeToolHighlightBorderWidth.Name: Active Indy shape tool border width
ActiveShapeToolHighlightBorderWidth.Hint: Inset border width for the selected Indy shape drawing tool button.

ShowDoorGlyphsInEditor.Name: Show door glyphs in Indy shape editor
ShowDoorGlyphsInEditor.Hint: When enabled, door and secret door segments show Foundry-style door glyphs while editing Indy wall shapes.

ShowShortcutHelpInEditor.Name: Show shortcut help in Indy shape editor
ShowShortcutHelpInEditor.Hint: When enabled, Indy shape editor controls include a compact help button showing shortcuts for the current shape tool.

SharedRectangleConversion.Name: Convert adjacent rectangles with shared sides
SharedRectangleConversion.Hint: When enabled, conversion can detect adjacent rectangles that share full or partial wall sides and hide duplicate shared segments. Disable this to use the older exclusive-wall rectangle detection.

RectangleConversionTolerance.Name: Convert to Indy Walls rectangle tolerance
RectangleConversionTolerance.Hint: Multiplier for how loosely plain walls may fit detected rectangles during conversion. Lower values are stricter; higher values convert more aggressively.

EllipseConversionTolerance.Name: Convert to Indy Walls ellipse tolerance
EllipseConversionTolerance.Hint: Multiplier for how loosely plain walls may fit detected ellipses during conversion. Lower values are stricter; higher values convert more aggressively.

ArcConversionTolerance.Name: Convert to Indy Walls arc tolerance
ArcConversionTolerance.Hint: Multiplier for how loosely plain walls may fit detected arcs during conversion. Lower values are stricter; higher values convert more aggressively.

BezierConversionTolerance.Name: Convert to Indy Walls Bezier tolerance
BezierConversionTolerance.Hint: Multiplier for how loosely plain walls may fit detected Bezier curves during conversion. Lower values are stricter; higher values convert more aggressively.

WallCleanupTolerance.Name: Wall cleanup snap tolerance
WallCleanupTolerance.Hint: Maximum pixel distance for the Clean Up Walls tool to snap wall endpoints together. Set to 0 to only remove exact duplicate lines.

WallCleanupRespectLevels.Name: Clean Up Walls respects levels
WallCleanupRespectLevels.Hint: When enabled, Clean Up Walls only snaps endpoints together when the walls share the same v14 level list. Disable this to allow snapping across levels.

WallCleanupSnapStandaloneTargets.Name: Clean Up Walls snaps to grid lines and map edges
WallCleanupSnapStandaloneTargets.Hint: When enabled, Clean Up Walls may move lone endpoints to nearby grid lines or map edges within cleanup tolerance. Disabled by default so endpoints only move toward other endpoints or wall segments.

WallCleanupSimplifyPaths.Name: Clean Up Walls simplifies noisy paths
WallCleanupSimplifyPaths.Hint: When enabled, Clean Up Walls may reduce compatible non-door plain wall paths into fewer segments while keeping the path within cleanup tolerance. Disabled by default.

PreviewWallColor.Name: Preview wall color
PreviewWallColor.Hint: Hex color for generated wall previews, for example #c10e56ff.

PreviewWindowWallColor.Name: Preview window segment color
PreviewWindowWallColor.Hint: Hex color for Indy preview segments marked as windows.

PreviewDoorWallColor.Name: Preview door segment color
PreviewDoorWallColor.Hint: Hex color for Indy preview segments marked as doors.

PreviewSecretWallColor.Name: Preview secret door segment color
PreviewSecretWallColor.Hint: Hex color for Indy preview segments marked as secret doors.

PreviewInvisibleWallColor.Name: Preview invisible segment color
PreviewInvisibleWallColor.Hint: Hex color for Indy preview segments marked as invisible walls.

PreviewTerrainWallColor.Name: Preview terrain segment color
PreviewTerrainWallColor.Hint: Hex color for Indy preview segments marked as terrain.

PreviewWallWidth.Name: Preview wall width
PreviewWallWidth.Hint: Line width for generated wall previews.

PreviewVertexColor.Name: Preview vertex color
PreviewVertexColor.Hint: Hex color for regular preview vertices.

PreviewVertexActiveColor.Name: Preview active vertex color
PreviewVertexActiveColor.Hint: Hex color for hovered or dragged rectangle split vertices.

PreviewVertexSize.Name: Preview vertex size
PreviewVertexSize.Hint: Size for regular preview vertices. Rectangle split vertices are drawn slightly larger.

PreviewEndpointColor.Name: Preview endpoint color
PreviewEndpointColor.Hint: Hex color for endpoint and rectangle corner handles.

PreviewEndpointSize.Name: Preview endpoint size
PreviewEndpointSize.Hint: Size for endpoint and rectangle corner handles.

PreviewHandleColor.Name: Preview Bezier handle color
PreviewHandleColor.Hint: Hex color for cubic Bezier control handles.

PreviewHandleSize.Name: Preview Bezier handle size
PreviewHandleSize.Hint: Size for cubic Bezier control handles.

PreviewMoveHandleColor.Name: Preview center handle color
PreviewMoveHandleColor.Hint: Hex color for the center handle used to move the active Indy shape preview.

PreviewMoveHandleSize.Name: Preview center handle size
PreviewMoveHandleSize.Hint: Size for the center handle used to move the active Indy shape preview.

PreviewOutlineColor.Name: Preview outline color
PreviewOutlineColor.Hint: Hex color for handle and vertex outlines.

PreviewOutlineWidth.Name: Preview outline width
PreviewOutlineWidth.Hint: Outline width for handles and vertices.

SetHoveredSegmentNormal.Name: Set hovered Indy wall segment to Normal
SetHoveredSegmentNormal.Hint: While editing an Indy wall shape, changes the segment under the mouse to a normal wall. If enabled in settings, also changes hovered Foundry walls.

SetHoveredSegmentDoor.Name: Set hovered Indy wall segment to Door
SetHoveredSegmentDoor.Hint: While editing an Indy wall shape, changes the segment under the mouse to a door. If enabled in settings, also changes hovered Foundry walls.

SetHoveredSegmentWindow.Name: Set hovered Indy wall segment to Window
SetHoveredSegmentWindow.Hint: While editing an Indy wall shape, changes the segment under the mouse to a window. If enabled in settings, also changes hovered Foundry walls.

SetHoveredSegmentInvisible.Name: Set hovered Indy wall segment to Invisible
SetHoveredSegmentInvisible.Hint: While editing an Indy wall shape, changes the segment under the mouse to an invisible wall. If enabled in settings, also changes hovered Foundry walls.

SetHoveredSegmentSecret.Name: Set hovered Indy wall segment to Secret Door
SetHoveredSegmentSecret.Hint: While editing an Indy wall shape, changes the segment under the mouse to a secret door. If enabled in settings, also changes hovered Foundry walls.

SetHoveredSegmentTerrain.Name: Set hovered Indy wall segment to Terrain
SetHoveredSegmentTerrain.Hint: While editing an Indy wall shape, changes the segment under the mouse to terrain. If enabled in settings, also changes hovered Foundry walls.

CycleHoveredSegmentCurve.Name: Cycle hovered Indy wall segment curve mode
CycleHoveredSegmentCurve.Hint: While editing a cubic or polyline Indy wall shape, cycles the curve mode for the segment under the mouse.

Shortcuts.Save: Save or create the current shape.
Shortcuts.WallTypeHotkeys: Set the hovered segment wall type.
Shortcuts.Levels: Use the level selector to set v14 wall levels.
Shortcuts.CubicToggleMode: Toggle the curve between arc and Bezier.
Shortcuts.SegmentShowHide: Show or hide the hovered segment.
Shortcuts.EllipseDrag: Resize, reshape, or rotate from handles and vertices.
Shortcuts.EllipseFromCenter: Place outward from the center point.
Shortcuts.RectangleAddRestore: Add a vertex / restore a hidden segment.
Shortcuts.PolylineAddRestore: Add a point or restore a hidden segment.
Shortcuts.PolylineCycleCurve: Cycle a segment between line, arc, and Bezier.
Shortcuts.PolylineRemoveHide: Remove a point or hide a segment.
Shortcuts.PolylineCurveSegments: Change detail for the hovered curve segment, or global curve detail when not over one.

Tooltips.CubicBezier: Click-drag to place the curve, then drag the red endpoints or green handles. Press C while hovering the curve to toggle between arc and Bezier modes. Use plus/minus or Ctrl-wheel to adjust segment count, Enter to create walls, or Escape to cancel.
Tooltips.Ellipse: Click-drag to place the ellipse, hold Alt for a circle, or hold Ctrl to grow from the center. Use plus/minus or Ctrl-wheel to adjust segment count, Enter to create walls, or Escape to cancel.
Tooltips.Rectangle: Click-drag to place the rectangle. Left-click a side to add a vertex, restore a gapped segment, or restore a removed side. Alt-click a segment to create a gap, Alt-click a vertex to remove it, drag vertices to reposition them, Enter creates walls, and Escape cancels.
Tooltips.Polyline: Click to place each vertex. Left-click a segment to add a point or restore a hidden segment, press C while hovering a segment to cycle line/arc/Bezier modes, drag curve handles to shape arcs and Beziers, Ctrl-scroll changes curved segment detail, Alt-click hides segments or removes points, Enter creates walls, and Escape cancels.
Tooltips.ConvertToIndyWalls: Scans plain Foundry walls in the current scene and previews Indy shape metadata. Adjust tolerance, then Save to convert or Cancel to discard. Axis-aligned closed rectangles are converted to Indy rectangles first; remaining connected wall paths are converted to Indy polylines.
Tooltips.RegionsToIndyWalls: Creates Indy wall shapes from selected Region shapes. If no Regions are selected, every Region in the scene is used. Region rectangles become Indy rectangles, ellipses and circles become Indy ellipses, and polygons become closed Indy polylines.
Tooltips.RegionConversionDetail: Number of generated wall segments used for circles and ellipses in Region conversion previews.
Tooltips.CleanupWalls: Snaps nearby wall endpoints together, smart-extends or trims endpoints to nearby wall segments, splits non-door plain walls at intersections, optionally simplifies noisy plain wall paths within tolerance, deletes collapsed walls, and removes duplicate lines with matching wall data. Indy shape endpoint metadata is updated where possible, but curve handles are left unchanged.

Notifications.CubicWallsCreated: Indy Walls | Created {count} curved wall segment(s).
Notifications.EllipseWallsCreated: Indy Walls | Created {count} ellipse wall segment(s).
Notifications.RectangleWallsCreated: Indy Walls | Created {count} rectangle wall segment(s).
Notifications.PolylineWallsCreated: Indy Walls | Created {count} polyline wall segment(s).
Notifications.SceneNotReady: Indy Walls | Canvas scene is not ready.
Notifications.NoWallsToConvert: Indy Walls | No plain walls found to convert.
Notifications.WallsConvertedToIndy: Indy Walls | Converted {count} wall(s) into {rectangles} rectangle(s), {ellipses} ellipse(s), and {polylines} polyline(s).
Notifications.NoRegionsToConvert: Indy Walls | No Regions found to convert.
Notifications.NoRegionShapesToConvert: Indy Walls | No supported Region shapes found to convert.
Notifications.RegionWallsCreated: Indy Walls | Created {count} wall segment(s) from {regions} Region(s): {rectangles} rectangle(s), {ellipses} ellipse(s), and {polylines} polyline(s).
Notifications.NoWallsToClean: Indy Walls | No walls found to clean.
Notifications.WallsAlreadyClean: Indy Walls | No wall cleanup changes were needed.
Notifications.WallsCleaned: Indy Walls | Cleaned walls: snapped or adjusted {snapped} endpoint(s), split {split} wall(s), simplified {simplified} wall segment(s), created {created} wall(s), updated {updated} wall(s), deleted {deleted} duplicate, simplified, or collapsed wall(s).
